comment: Excellent quality food. My golden retriever loves it and his coat looks much shinier since we switched to this salmon formula.
It clumps pretty well and keeps odors down, but it leaves a bit of dust tracked around the litter box.
Super durable! My pitbull usually destroys toys in minutes, but this rubber one has lasted for weeks without a scratch.
The tree looks beautiful and the sisal posts are great, but the structure wobbles a bit when my heavy cat jumps to the top.
Perfect high-value rewards for obedience training. They smell strong, which instantly grabs my dog's attention.
My cat licked the gravy but left the actual tuna chunks untouched. Might just be a picky cat issue, but she didn't love it.
Really helped control the pulling during our morning walks. The reflective straps are a great safety bonus for night walks too.
An absolute lifesaver for cutting my cat's nails. Distracting him with this pureed treat makes grooming so much easier.
It has a very pleasant and mild scent, and it didn't irritate my bulldog's sensitive skin at all. Will definitely buy again.
Terrible product. The motor stopped working after just three days of use, and my cats went back to refusing standing water.
